race.comment: PERFECT NIGHT (13) presents third up having been right there in two runs back from a spell, beaten under a length at Cranbourne last time out. She's another drawn wide but can be peaking up in trip now, go close. ANGLING ANGEL (12) was just fair fresh at Cranbourne in the same race but was only first up and should be a quick improver with that run under her belt. MR MARGOLIN (9) was disappointing at Stony Creek last time but had showed ability on debut, he maps ideally here and can turn things around. DUKE OF CLARENCE (2) is going okay and has minor claims.
